titles: 헝가리 물가 17.6%가 16년 독재 체제를 끝장낸 소름돋는 과정

image_concepts.A: 오르반 충격 표정 + 경제 붕괴 그래프 (하락 화살표)
image_concepts.B: 투표함과 장바구니 오버레이 + 오르반 실루엣 소멸

thumbnails.concept_ko: [캔버스] 16:9 비율, 1280x720 픽셀 정확히. 가로형 유튜브 썸네일 규격. 컨셉 A 실사.
thumbnails.prompt_en: [CANVAS] 16:9 aspect ratio, exactly 1280x720 pixels, horizontal YouTube thumbnail format. Photorealistic cinematic close-up of Viktor Orban (Hungarian Prime Minister) with a shocked, defeated expression, looking slightly downward. Behind him, a dramatic red downward arrow and economic decline graph overlay the dark navy background. Intense rim lighting separates his face from the moody backdrop, creating a sense of political downfall and economic crisis. Moody cinematic atmosphere with deep shadows.

thumbnails.concept_ko: [캔버스] 16:9 비율, 1280x720 픽셀 정확히. 가로형 유튜브 썸네일 규격. 컨셉 A 애니메.
thumbnails.prompt_en: [CANVAS] 16:9 aspect ratio, exactly 1280x720 pixels, horizontal YouTube thumbnail format. Anime-style dramatic illustration of a stern-faced European political leader resembling Viktor Orban with an exaggerated shocked expression. Behind him, a massive red downward arrow crashes through economic charts and graphs. Dark cinematic atmosphere with bold cel-shading, vivid red and orange accent colors against deep navy background. Intense dramatic perspective emphasizing political downfall. Tense, foreboding atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: [캔버스] 16:9 비율, 1280x720 픽셀 정확히. 가로형 유튜브 썸네일 규격. 컨셉 B 하이브리드. 회색에서 파랑으로 전환되는 그라디언트 배경.
thumbnails.prompt_en: [CANVAS] 16:9 aspect ratio, exactly 1280x720 pixels, horizontal YouTube thumbnail format. Hybrid digital art combining photorealistic and stylized elements. A ballot box in the center with a grocery shopping basket placed on top of it, symbolizing economy meeting democracy. In the background, a dark silhouette of Viktor Orban fading away into shadows. Color gradient transitioning from dark grey on the left to hopeful blue on the right. Green economic accent colors on the basket. Dramatic lighting with strong contrast between the fading figure and the illuminated ballot box. Cinematic moody atmosphere.
